task.title: Investigate broker spawn flow for agent.spawn_requested silent drop

events.content: Condition branch-local spawn dedup on whether top-level control dedup already used the agent-name key: Condition branch-local spawn dedup on whether top-level control dedup already used the agent-name key

raw.question: Condition branch-local spawn dedup on whether top-level control dedup already used the agent-name key
raw.chosen: Condition branch-local spawn dedup on whether top-level control dedup already used the agent-name key
raw.reasoning: Preserves local WS echo suppression for event-id keyed spawns while preventing valid name-only broker spawn requests from being discarded before workers.spawn()

retrospective.summary: Fixed Relaycast broker spawn dedup so name-only agent.spawn_requested events reach workers.spawn while preserving local echo suppression for event-id keyed echoes; added regression tests
